subcodes.first_line: O ye steadfast ones, O ye firm and unwavering ones! A fragrant breeze, a musk-laden zephyr, wafteth from the region of Kirman unto the senses of the yearning ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان ای راسخان نسیم معطری و نفحه معنبری از خطه کرمان بمشام مشتاقان میرسد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies
